title: Glass Station
public_claim: Specifies Glass Station, a Murano OS room that preserves, renders, and audits the full intellectual terrain of the US intelligence community: institutional structure, bureaucratic process, legal and oversight constraints, institutional ethos/temperament, HUMINT mechanics, interagency friction and deconfliction, liaison and embassy politics, politicization and failure modes, historical change and.
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
